name: Csl Limited
analysis: CSL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 57% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$114.8700, stop A$101.1285, target A$126.4900 (0.85:1) — then trail it.
